name: HKDF

documentation.description:
Library-level alias so users don't need to "with System.Storage_Elements"
directly. Byte_Array is semantically identical to
System.Storage_Elements.Storage_Array.

subprograms.name: Expand

documentation.description: OKM = HKDF-Expand(PRK, info, L)  where L = OKM'Length

subprograms.name: Extract

documentation.description:
PRK = HMAC-Hash(salt, IKM)
If Salt is empty, a string of Hash_Length zeros is used.

formals.name: HMAC_Compute
